channel.title: Uttar Pradesh on Gajab Jobs
channel.description: Recent content in Uttar Pradesh on Gajab Jobs

item.title: UPSSSC Vidhan Bhawan Guard & Fireman Online Form 2026
item.description: The UPSSSC has announced 170 vacancies for Fireman and Vidhan Bhawan Guard posts under Recruitment 2026. Applicants must have qualified PET 2025 and passed 12th standard. The online application process starts from 09 June 2026 and ends on 29 June 2026. Selection will be based on written exam followed by physical test and document verification.
